sizing_rule.note: Dynamic fractional f with periodic equity transfers. Quarterly transfer percentage P = 1 - (Initial_Inactive_Allocation)^(1/N). Example: P = 0.0220672315 for 80% inactive over 10 quarters. Equation (8.01) FG^N <= G^N*FRAC+1-FRAC must be satisfied with sufficiently high N. Adjusts quarterly based on program duration and initial inactive allocation.

source_rule_text: Use dynamic fractional f with periodic equity transfers from active to inactive accounts, adjusting quarterly transfer percentages based on program duration and initial inactive equity allocation.
